title: allow localparam in parameter port list

features.name: localparam in module parameter port list
features.description: Code should include a module with localparam declared inside the parameter port list (#(...)) where localparam depends on a parameter
features.snippet: module foo #(parameter SIZE=256, localparam BITS=$clog2(SIZE)) (input [BITS-1:0] a, output [BITS-1:0] y); assign y=a; endmodule
